ddls:
CREATE TABLE "apps" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each app */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the app */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the app belongs to */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the app */,
  "reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the app */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the app in bytes */,
  "installs" INTEGER /* Number of times the app has been installed */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the app (e.g., Free, Paid) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the app */,
  "content_rating" TEXT /* Content rating of the app (e.g., Everyone, Teen) */,
  "app_version" TEXT /* Version of the app */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the app */,
  "min_sdk_version" INTEGER /* Minimum Android SDK version required */,
  "target_sdk_version" INTEGER /* Target Android SDK version */,
  "supports_64bit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the app supports 64-bit architecture */,
  "privacy_policy_url" TEXT /* URL of the app's privacy policy */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., ART_AND_DESIGN, EDUCATION) */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_categories" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the app belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Developer's website */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the developer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the developer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Company name (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_developers" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who published the app */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the developer is the primary developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id", "developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app being reviewed */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the reviewer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the review */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review has been flagged */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was posted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the rating */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating has been flagged */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "is_banned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is banned */,
  "ban_reason" TEXT /* Reason for banning the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the review */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the rating */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., downloads, ratings) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user if the metric is user-specific */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., phone, tablet) */,
  "operating_system_version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "app_version" TEXT /* Version of the app for which the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)
